checks.details: Batch totals computed with BigDecimal. Running totals verified against individual transaction sums. No precision loss in aggregation
Batch processing is transactional — entire batch rolls back on failure. Record counts validated against input. Error records written to reject file
Batch job runs with service account credentials. Input file validation prevents injection. Output files have restricted permissions
Batch record processing matches COBOL PERFORM UNTIL logic. Error handling matches ABEND code behavior. Sort order preserved from VSAM key sequence
Batch job — no REST API. Triggered via Quarkus @Scheduled annotation
Batch processor pattern with reader/processor/writer. Javadoc references CBTRN01C.cbl. 91% line coverage
